code_template: Perform batch effect correction using Harmony.
Memory-First: Accepts both file path (str) and AnnData object.
Parameter Safety: Uses default_params merged with agent_params.
Metadata Footprinting: Records execution to adata.uns['analysis_history'].
Path to AnnData file or AnnData object in memory
AnnData with batch-corrected PCA in obsm['X_pca_harmony']
adata = input_data if isinstance(input_data, ad.AnnData) else sc.read(input_data)
raise ValueError(f"Batch key '{batch_key}' not found in obs. Available columns: {list(adata.obs.columns)}")
raise ValueError("X_pca not found in obsm. Run PCA before Harmony batch correction.")

cognitive_layer.purpose: Harmony corrects batch effects by softly clustering cells across batches and adjusting coordinates to maximize cell diversity while minimizing batch-specific variation. Unlike methods that completely remove batch effects, Harmony preserves biological variation while accounting for technical artifacts.

parameter_impact.theta: Diversity clustering penalty. Higher values allow more diversity within clusters, providing stricter batch correction. Lower values keep cells more similar within batches.
parameter_impact.lambda_: Diversity scaling penalty. Higher values result in more aggressive batch correction by scaling down batch-specific variation more strongly.

error_handling.KeyError: batch key not found: Ensure the batch column exists in adata.obs. Common keys: 'batch', 'stim', 'donor', 'sample'.
error_handling.ValueError: X_pca not found: Run sc.tl.pca() before Harmony batch correction.

post_processing_code: return {'metrics': {}, 'warnings': ['Harmony batch correction not found in history'], 'success': False}
warnings.append('Harmony did not converge. Consider increasing max_iter_harmony.')
warnings.append(f'WARNING: Only {n_batches} batch(es) detected. Batch correction may not be necessary.')

overcorrection.causal_chain: Lower theta reduces the diversity penalty, allowing more batch-specific variation to remain, which preserves subtle biological differences.
overcorrection.expected_effect: Less aggressive batch correction, more biological variation preserved

undercorrection.causal_chain: Higher theta increases the diversity penalty, forcing clusters to be more mixed across batches, resulting in stronger batch correction.
